/**
 * Echo service with multiple operations
 * Echo 服务包含多个操作
 *
 * @generated from protobuf service api.v1.echo.Echo
 */
export interface IEchoClient {
    /**
     * Basic echo - returns the same message
     * 基础回显 - 返回相同的消息
     *
     * @generated from protobuf rpc: Echo
     */
    echo(input: EchoRequest, options?: RpcOptions): GrtpPromise<EchoRequest, EchoResponse>;
    /**
     * Double echo - repeats the message twice
     * 双倍回显 - 重复消息两次
     *
     * @generated from protobuf rpc: DoubleEcho
     */
    doubleEcho(input: EchoRequest, options?: RpcOptions): GrtpPromise<EchoRequest, EchoResponse>;
    /**
     * Reverse echo - returns reversed message
     * 反转回显 - 返回反转的消息
     *
     * @generated from protobuf rpc: ReverseEcho
     */
    reverseEcho(input: EchoRequest, options?: RpcOptions): GrtpPromise<EchoRequest, EchoResponse>;
}
/**
 * Echo service with multiple operations
 * Echo 服务包含多个操作

 * @generated from protobuf service api.v1.echo.Echo

    typeName = Echo.typeName;
    methods = Echo.methods;
    options = Echo.options;
    constructor(private readonly _transport: RpcTransport) {
    }
    /**
     * Basic echo - returns the same message
     * 基础回显 - 返回相同的消息
     *
     * @generated from protobuf rpc: Echo
     */

        return executeGrtp<EchoRequest, EchoResponse>("unary", this._transport, method, opt, input);
    }
    /**
     * Double echo - repeats the message twice
     * 双倍回显 - 重复消息两次
     *
     * @generated from protobuf rpc: DoubleEcho

    doubleEcho(input: EchoRequest, options?: RpcOptions): GrtpPromise<EchoRequest, EchoResponse> {
        const method = this.methods[1], opt = this._transport.mergeOptions(options);
        return executeGrtp<EchoRequest, EchoResponse>("unary", this._transport, method, opt, input);
    }
    /**
     * Reverse echo - returns reversed message
     * 反转回显 - 返回反转的消息
     *
     * @generated from protobuf rpc: ReverseEcho

    reverseEcho(input: EchoRequest, options?: RpcOptions): GrtpPromise<EchoRequest, EchoResponse> {
        const method = this.methods[2], opt = this._transport.mergeOptions(options);
        return executeGrtp<EchoRequest, EchoResponse>("unary", this._transport, method, opt, input);
